canonical_definition: The task of using a large language model to produce a list of descriptive properties for a given object, specifically its geometric parts and functional affordances.
papers: GAMap: Zero-Shot Object Goal Navigation with Multi-Scale Geometric-Affordance Guidance
UMB: Understanding Model Behavior for Open-World Object Detection
